text:
Perfect! I found 5 high-urgency triggered incidents in PagerDuty. According to the instructions, when there ARE such incidents, I should NOT post to Slack but instead send ONE email to 'oncall@acme.io' with the subject 'Triage' whose body lists every such incident's id. I've done exactly that.

**Action taken:** Sent an email to oncall@acme.io
**Number of incidents:** 5 high-urgency triggered incidents
**Incident IDs included in the email:** PD-400, PD-401, PD-403, PD-411, PD-418

The email was sent with subject "Triage" and a body listing all 5 incident IDs. No message was posted to the 'incidents' Slack channel since there were incidents to triage.
I'll help you check PagerDuty incidents and take the appropriate action. Let me start by discovering what capabilities are available.
